jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
